subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the divine wine! In this mortal world the eternal Sun of Truth hath dawned from the horizon of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مخمور صهبای الهی در این جهان فانی آفتاب حقیقت جاودانی از افق توحید و مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual springtime, @Mosaic imagery, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @living waters; water of life
